questions.question: What was India's rank in the 2025 Human Development Index (HDI) released by the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP)?

questions.option_2: To establish a unified military command structure
questions.option_4: To integrate paramilitary forces under the Ministry of Defence

questions.question: Which of the following sectors contributed the most to India’s defence exports in FY 2023-24?
questions.option_1: The private sector and DPSUs equally
questions.option_2: The private sector contributed about 60% and DPSUs about 40%

questions.question: Which Indian minister highlighted India's economic growth and IT advancements at Davos 2025?
In which State will north India's first nuclear project be set up?
Which of the following initiatives were launched by the Department of Posts in May 2025 to modernise India’s addressing system and enhance last-mile delivery?
questions.option_1: Digital India Address Mapping and National Postal Tracker
questions.option_2: India Address Precision System and Postal Service Enhancer
questions.option_3: GeoLocate India and Postal Code Finder
questions.option_4: Know Your DIGIPIN and Know Your PIN Code web platforms

questions.question: Which private firm produced the first rear fuselage for Light Combat Aircraft Mk1A that was handed over to Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL) in Bengaluru?
What is the primary objective of the International Organization for Mediation (IOMed), established by China in 2025?
questions.option_1: To provide a platform to conduct military peacekeeping operations
questions.option_2: To provide a platform for peaceful dispute resolution through mediation
questions.option_3: To provide a platform to enforce international trade agreements
questions.option_4: To replace the United Nations Security Council

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the 'Ayush Suraksha' portal launched by the Union Ayush Minister in 2025?
questions.option_1: To promote exports of Ayurvedic drugs through global outreach
questions.option_2: To monitor misleading ads and adverse drug reactions in real time
questions.option_3: To certify traditional healers and standardise treatment protocols
questions.option_4: To track AYUSH medicine imports through a digital interface
